title: buddleja davidii var. wilsonii
intro: Buddleja davidii var. wilsonii, also known as the Butterfly Bush, is a deciduous shrub native to China and widely cultivated for its ornamental value. This plant contains flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Buddleja davidii var. wilsonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
